betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Information Screen§f

§aMonitor your energy grids in real-time with slick, flat-panel displays!§f

The §9Information Screen§f is a thin display panel from §6RFTools Power§f that displays real-time energy information from any adjacent §bRF/FE-compatible block§f. Although primarily used to monitor modular Powercell networks, it is universally compatible with standard energy storage systems.

§6Features & Usage§f:
§b• Flush Mounting§f: The panel sits flush against any face of a block (taking up only §e0.05 blocks§f of depth), keeping your cabling and walking space completely clear.
§b• Display Modes§f: §9Right-click§f the screen with a §9wrench§f or §9Smart Wrench§f to cycle between different display modes, showing current storage capacity, percentage full, and active RF/t flow rates.
§b• Universal Compatibility§f: Displays energy statistics from any block implementing standard Forge Energy (FE) or Redstone Flux (RF) capabilities.

§6Crafting§f:
§eCrafted using a straightforward recipe:§f
§b• 3× Glass Panes§f (top row)
§b• 2× Redstone§f (middle sides)
§b• 1× Machine Base§f (center) — or an §bIron Block§f if RFTools is not loaded.

§eTip§f: Place multiple Information Screens on different sides of a single Powercell to monitor input rate, output rate, and total stored energy simultaneously from a single glance.
